title: gpt-image-2
prompt:
Primary request: A premium editorial cover on a sophisticated dark navy near-black background with subtle depth. 

Top area brand mark: in the upper-left, a small stylized clean editorial line illustration of the classic Hermes Agent mascot — an anime-style young woman with short dark bob hair, wearing over-ear headphones, wearing a white top with a small "H" badge on the collar — rendered in warm off-white and subtle accent line work, acting as the brand identity for the article. To the right of this brand mark, a medium-prominent typographic title reading EXACTLY "Mixture of Agents" in clean modern sans-serif, TITLE CASE (capital M and A only, lowercase elsewhere — preserve exact casing), warm off-white, confident editorial weight. Below the title, a thin precise horizontal rule, then a small subtitle reading EXACTLY "多模型协作做成一个 model" in clean modern Chinese sans-serif, warm off-white.

Main composition: a precise VERTICAL pipeline. On the left: a small uppercase section label reading EXACTLY "REFERENCES". Below it, three reference model badges arranged in a vertical column, stacked top to bottom. Each reference badge is a clean colored circular medallion (slate blue, terracotta, sage) CONTAINING the recognizable brand logo of that model in white/light (the OpenAI flower/knot for gpt-5.5, the deepseek flame/whale mark for deepseek-v4-pro, the xAI X mark for grok-4), with a precise text label to the right of each badge reading EXACTLY "REFERENCE 1 · gpt-5.5", "REFERENCE 2 · deepseek-v4-pro", "REFERENCE 3 · grok-4". Thin precise lines extend rightward from each badge, converging into a single larger deep warm charcoal filled circle (the aggregator) with a subtle thin outer ring, labeled reading EXACTLY "AGGREGATOR" with "claude-opus-4.8" beneath. A small label reading EXACTLY "AGGREGATOR" above. From the aggregator, one clean line with a small arrowhead extends to a final element on the far right labeled reading EXACTLY "VERDICT". A small label reading EXACTLY "VERDICT" above it.

Crisp legible verbatim text throughout, EXACT title case preserved. Limited sophisticated palette (deep navy, warm off-white, slate blue, terracotta, sage, deep warm charcoal). Premium editorial composition with genuine visual weight and depth. Generous whitespace, no decorative noise, no hand-drawn, no human figures other than the Hermes mascot brand mark, no robots, no floating logos outside the medallions.
Style/medium: premium dark editorial cover, sophisticated depth, Hermes mascot brand mark, brand logo medallions, vertical pipeline, confident typography
